ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "geoid" TEXT /* Geographic identifier */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "m_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "m_inc_group" INTEGER /* Median household income group */,
  "med3_over_total" REAL /* Percentage of households with income above $200,000 */,
  "m_rent" REAL /* Median rent */,
  "m_rent_group" INTEGER /* Median rent group */,
  "med3_rent" REAL /* Percentage of households with rent above $2,000 */,
  "m_own" REAL /* Median owner-occupied housing value */,
  "m_own_group" INTEGER /* Median owner-occupied housing value group */,
  "med3_own" REAL /* Percentage of households with owner-occupied housing value above $1,000,000 */,
  "perc_white" REAL /* Percentage of white population */,
  "perc_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of population below poverty level */,
  "perc_o25_ed" REAL /* Percentage of population with education above 25 years */,
  "owner_occ" REAL /* Owner-occupied housing units */,
  "rent_occ" REAL /* Renter-occupied housing units */,
  "rent_vac" REAL /* Rental vacancy rate */,
  "temp_vac" REAL /* Temporary vacancy rate */,
  "other_vac" REAL /* Other vacancy rate */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_geoid FOREIGN KEY ("geoid") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("geoid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_m_own_group FOREIGN KEY ("m_own_group") REFERENCES housing_values ("housing_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_m_inc_group FOREIGN KEY ("m_inc_group") REFERENCES income_groups ("inc_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "geoid" TEXT /* Geographic identifier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "county" TEXT /* County name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geoid")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "inc_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "inc_group_name" TEXT /* Income group name */,
  "min_income" REAL /* Minimum income for the group */,
  "max_income" REAL /* Maximum income for the group */,
  "inc_group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the income group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inc_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "ed_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "ed_level_name" TEXT /* Education level name */,
  "min_ed_years" INTEGER /* Minimum education years for the level */,
  "max_ed_years" INTEGER /* Maximum education years for the level */,
  "ed_level_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ed_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_values" (
  "housing_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing value */,
  "housing_value_name" TEXT /* Housing value name */,
  "min_housing_value" REAL /* Minimum housing value for the group */,
  "max_housing_value" REAL /* Maximum housing value for the group */,
  "housing_value_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the housing value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Version name */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Source name */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date the source was added */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_name" TEXT /* Metadata name */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Metadata value */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metric belongs to */,
  "quality_name" TEXT /* Data quality metric name */,
  "quality_value" REAL /* Data quality metric value */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_membership" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
